summary_en: Special dividend of 4.5 yen/share, totaling ¥90M, for FY3/26 (record date 31 March 2026, effective 29 June 2026). Replaces ordinary dividend (0 yen), marking 45th anniversary. No regular dividend declared.
title_en: Notice regarding implementation of 45th anniversary commemorative dividend
translation_en_brief: Almedio Inc. announced on 14 May 2026 that its board has approved a special dividend to mark the company's 45th anniversary. The dividend consists of 4.5 yen per share, totaling ¥90 million, for the fiscal year ending 31 March 2026 (record date 31 March 2026, payable 29 June 2026). The company stated that retained earnings remain in deficit, so no ordinary dividend (previously forecast at 0 yen) is being declared; the special commemorative dividend is the sole payout for the period. The resolution requires approval at the 46th ordinary general meeting of shareholders scheduled for 26 June 2026.
